description: Self-hosted auth guides mixed with UI components and docker config
rationale: Call-graph analysis: self-hosting guide docs, NavigationMenu.constants.ts, and docker-compose.yml form multiple disconnected components. Documentation files, UI constants, and Docker config have no shared function call relationships = 3+ components = ERROR.
notes: Previously error under domain-based classification (auth+ui+config = 3 domains). Still error under call-graph analysis but for a different reason: multiple disconnected components with no import/call edges between them.
